properties.name: Sherman Minton Bridge (I-64)
properties.description: High-priority icing blackspot; major Louisville-Indiana connector.

properties.name: Kennedy Bridge (I-65)
properties.description: Critical bridge over the Ohio River; prone to rapid surface freezing.

properties.name: I-75 Clays Ferry Bridge
properties.description: High-elevation bridge south of Lexington; severe icing history.
